title: 四階段系統提示詞架構 (RTCO)
prompt:
# Codex PPT Slide Image Prompt

## Canvas
{
  "type": "16:9 full-slide PowerPoint image",
  "language": "Chinese",
  "slide_number": 22,
  "render_slide_number": false
}

## Deck Goal
Explain how to construct and use AI-assisted grading systems for high school science lab reports under the 108 Curriculum.

## Global Style
{
  "name": "清爽專業自然風 (Style A)",
  "visual_direction": "clean, professional, academic, natural science training presentation",
  "color_palette": "Sage green (#5a7a6a) and soft light-green gradient as theme colors. Deep slate gray (#2d3748) for primary text. Amber (#b8894a) for highlights. Soft light gray or off-white background with minimal card structures.",
  "typography": "Elegant Chinese Serif (Songti) for titles, clean Sans-serif (Heiti) for body text and bullet points."
}

## Style Reference Images To Inspect
- Style Reference 1: /Users/froglssh/Library/CloudStorage/GoogleDrive-frog@lssh.tp.edu.tw/我的雲端硬碟/0AI應用/0-AI輔助批改評分/2實驗報告批改/AI_Grading_PPT/origin_image/slide_08.png

## Slide
{
  "number": 22,
  "title": "四階段系統提示詞架構 (RTCO)",
  "role": "architecture",
  "intent": "Introduce the RTCO prompting framework."
}

## Text
{
  "title": "四階段系統提示詞架構 (RTCO)",
  "key_points": [
    "RTCO 架構：自然科學評量提示詞工程的四個核心要素",
    "角色定義 (Role)：指定 20 年高中資深教師身份，設定嚴謹與指導性的學術語氣",
    "任務拆解 (Task)：以編號拆解獨立認知步驟，分步推理（分析-檢核-評分）",
    "約束條件 (Constraints)：定義絕對限制，如原話引用、嚴禁過度推論意圖",
    "輸出格式 (Output Format)：格式化 Markdown 表格、具體修改建議與信心分數"
  ]
}

## Layout
{
  "composition": "four-quadrant grid layout illustrating the RTCO components (Role, Task, Constraints, Output)"
}

## Universal Constraints
- The final image itself must contain the title and key points.
- Render Chinese text exactly and legibly; avoid garbled characters.
- Keep the confirmed deck style consistent.
